name: the committed walkthrough requirements artifact is fully cited
command: ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(File.read(ARGV[0])); abort unless (d["needs_grounding"]||[]).empty? && d["concerns_total"].to_i>0' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/examples/dog-walker-marketplace/artifacts/02-technical-requirements.json" && echo committed-design-cited 1>&2
